title: tetrazygia lanceolata subsp. minor
intro: Tetrazygia lanceolata subsp. minor, also known as the minor lance-leaf Tetrazygia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the family Melastomataceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The minor lance-leaf Tetrazygia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
